title: Emmanuel Moulin: From innovation to monetary sovereignty - striking the right note
body:
Speech by Mr Emmanuel Moulin, Governor of the Bank of France, at VivaTech, Paris, 19 June 2026.

title: Joachim Nagel: New forms of money and the transmission of monetary policy

title: Christine Lagarde: Money in transition
body:

title: Steven Maijoor: Opening statement - round table on the Market Integration and Supervision Package in the House of Representatives
body:
